entry.title: Billing party wise Asset capitalization Report
entry.content:
Requirement:

Vendor wise report for the Assets settled using IO and WBS/Network.

Any standard report available in S/4 HANA or fiori?

entry.title: Re: SAP BW - Master Data Delta Load
entry.content: Can someone please help us on this topic

entry.title: Re: Special characters not displayed correctly in SAP BO 4.3
entry.content: Should be related to Environment variables, check those , like , Set the NLS_LANG Environment Variable to UTF8 (oracle.com)

entry.title: Re: How do I find all WebI documents or schedules using O...
entry.content: You cannot, even with CMS universe nothing pops up 😕 , was trying to achieve this some time ago as well. Unsecfully

entry.title: Quota Arrangement in Make To Order Scenario
entry.content:
Dear All,                                                                                                                                                              We need to imply the quota arrangement in  MTO process.                                                                             We have maintained below Prerequisites for Quota Arrangements_                                                                    i.e. Vendor Info Record, Source List & Quota Arrangements are maintained.                                                              Splitting Quota Indicator is activated in MRP Lot Sizing Procedure

But after MRP run, purchase requisition are getting created for Single Vendor instead of getting split into vendors as per maintained quota.

Can anyone help in these case.                                                                                                                            Please  Reply 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Correct amortization passed mistakenly on an auc
entry.content: You have to specify account to avoid error AU133

entry.title: Re: SAC - Hyperlink Story Page to Story Page from table u...
entry.content:
Hi axel_, 

   You try the approach as mentioned in this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/hyperlinking-by-click-on-a-cell-in-a-table-in-sac-story/qaq-p/12312970

   You may achieve jump with context to another page, but not as directly hyperlink in table cell, instead, you can have the jump from right click on a data cell. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Integration with a GST Validation tool USING API IN SAP ABAP

entry.title: Re: Purpose of INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY
entry.content:
Thanks @Susanne_Helbig for your reply and sorry for late response. Here I have one question. What is the case if master data is maintained properly in the hierarchy, then in that case, we do miss the correct in our data action. Let's consider the below scenario : 

Now, I have added one more company code C14 which is already maintained in master data(dimension table) as shown below.

Now in this case, since all the members of the company code dimension is assigned to hierarchy and with the config script CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_NOT_IN_HIERARHCY_MEMBER, what members will it fetch ?

Thanks in advance. 

Regards,

Praveen.

entry.title: Re: How to add custom field in request material mdg fiori...
entry.content: For information on the extension of the Fiori app Request New Material(F0502) please refer to the help documentation: App Extensibility: Request Material.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Error in executing the action in Process flow
entry.content: @Saurabh_Mittal  Did you get any work-around on this? We're facing the same issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Error in executing the action in Process flow
entry.content: No, I did not. Waiting for #SAP Build Process Automation community to help.

entry.title: Re: Nested JSON to SAP HANA Tables with SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi @Bais

I am not sure if I got your question correctly but if you're asking me why I multicast the message in two branches it's because as we have to insert data in two different tables so we have two structures, we can add them in the same Message mapping but then we would have to deal with the multi-message nodes in XML structure. I felt like this was easier and more efficient way to do it.

As for why we don't post the data directly, it's because here some data manipulation takes place without which we can't acquire the desired results.

I hope I made it clear please let me know!

Regards,

Harshal

entry.title: Re: Billing party wise Asset capitalization Report
entry.content:
Hi @PiyushDabhi 

The question answered earlier might be of help:

Solved: Asset report with Internal order - SAP Community

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: SAP ADT installation issue
entry.content:
Hi, 

What Update site do you use to install from? Based on the error mesage you use 2023-09.

Try using the "latest" repository: https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest

Best regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: Lean Service Enablement for Project Networks
entry.content:
Hi Mario,

@Mario_Franz Thanks for sharing this exhaustive document. 

Background

We have commenced and is now a considerable way through our S/4 HANA upgrade we are an On-Premise customer and are upgrading from 1809 to 2022. While like most upgrade projects the scope is predominately a technical upgrade, We are also taking the opportunity to simplify our landscape by decommissioning SRM and implemented S/4 procurement, replacing the SRM procurement processes with S/4 Procurement, however we have hit a bit of a snag.

 

The Issue/Opportunity

A fundamental change is in the direction SAP is taking with S/4 Procurement is the migration from Classic Services to Lean Services, while in its purest form in procurement lean services have minimal impact across the business, however when we have dived into the broader procurement activities, in particular the implications on our Asset Management processes (the linking of Work Orders to NWA’s to Project to Purchase Orders), we have and are hitting a few roadblocks and complexities.

 

Our current understanding is that to enable Lean Services we will also need to convert any Service related PO's that use Classic Services, recreating them to now use Lean Services (as you can’t run both at the same time), but what does this actually means, what do we have too do, does the conversation process include a big bang approach of closing all active projects, service PO's, and re-creating them for Go Live Day, or is there an option to only convert those components related that related to Classic Services etc (specific NWA’s/WBS etc). Since we are implementing Lean services in BAU system, closing all Project/NWS/WO is last option for us. Is there way existing data can be converted to Lean services. Purticularly Project/NWA.

The other (and recent) challenge we have is the usage of time sheeting for Contractors (CATS), we rely on Contracts submitting Timesheets against this Service PO’s for both payment to them (or their Hire Company) and for cost allocation to the work they are completing, but what are the implications of this with the move to Lean Services, as only service entry sheets are supported in S/4 2022.

 

Regards

 

Sagar

entry.title: Re: Field for Training Provider at Item Level
entry.content: Hi @FredericMONEGER, I will say a ballpark figure is around 500 and upwards for now, given the various geographical locations that we are in. The number could grow with time. I agree that a referenced field is a lot more organized but the thought of building an additional process to create a new value every time a new provider is onboarded is something we need to assess. Do you happen to know if there is a KBA on the permissioning for "source" and best practice? I am curious if the permission can be delegated to learning administrator level rather than at a LMS System Admin level.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning Advanced formula code clarification.
entry.content:
This formula takes measure M1, but only if there are data in measure M2.

Multiplikation makes a join, *0+1 sets the join partner to 1 so that the left side is multiplied with 1 - but only if there are data on the right side.

entry.title: Re: Consume external OData as Batch Request
entry.content:
Thanks for clarification about "batch". I have checked this resource explaining OData Batch processing. Is it what you want?

If yes, then it seems it should be doable with ABAP - HTTP requests, using cl_http_client. But I did not tried it myself.
Only tricky part seems to be working with Multipart content type in request + response. But ABAP HTTP request has method "ADD_MULTIPART". For HTTP Multipart response I see "NUM_MULTIPARTS" (Returns the number of multi-part segments of this entity) + "GET_MULTIPART" method (Returns the specified multipart segment of this entity).

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Unable to debug Custom function module in CG54.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am creating report from specification and the released report is available in CG54 transaction as you can see in the below image.

I have used few standard function module and custom function module inside the report and in both function module I have placed Session and external breakpoints.

When I click on display document on front end pc that is marked in green the standard FM C14N_SYMBOL_STACK_PUSH gets triggered, but my custom FM will not be triggered.

 

Please can you help me understand how to trigger my CUSTOM FM when using CG54 to generate report..

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: It seems that there is no answer maybe I am not understandable. In a JSON it is the same to send an element as table with the following ways: 1. {"table": [ {"a": 1, "b": 2 }, {"c": 1, "d": 2 } ] } and 2. {"table": {"a": 1, "b": 2 }, {"c": 1, "d": 2 } }.

entry.title: Re: Consume external OData as Batch Request
entry.content: Yes, that's what I'm trying to achieve. Before doing these code-pull ups 🙂 I wanted to make sure, there isn't a nicer/easier way. Thanks for your feedback Tomas!

entry.title: Output Type SPED trigger Inbound Delivery after PGI for Inter-Company STO's Outbound delivery
entry.content:
Inter-company purchasing is a very common business scenario in many SAP projects. In project practice, inter-company STO (or cross-company STO) is used to realize this process.                                     Different projects have different practices:

  • In some projects, one-step transfer is adopted, that is, after the issue company post goods issues by VL02N, the receiving company automatically completes the goods receipt posting.
  • In some projects, two-step transfer is adopted, that is, the issue company first performs goods issue posting, and then the receiving company performs goods receipt posting separately.
  • In some projects, inbound delivery needs to be created on the receiving side. Through the system settings, SAP can automatically trigger the inbound delivery document in this scenario after the goods issue posted by the issue company.

In this document we will discuss how to use the SAP standard output type SPED, to realize the function of automatically triggering the inbound delivery after the goods issue of outbound delivery is posted.              The Configuration Steps we have to maintain:                                                                             Maintain Output Types:                                                                                                           Configuration: SPRO –> IMG –> Logistics Execution –> Shipping –> Basic Shipping Functions –> Output Control –> Output Determination –> Maintain Output Determination for Outbound Deliveries –> Maintain Output Types"SPED" is the standard Output Type.Double click on the Output Type “SPED”.                                                                                                      These are the standard settings for the Output Type SPED.Maintain Output determination procedure: Configuration: SPRO –> IMG –> Logistics Execution –> Shipping –> Basic Shipping Functions  –> Output Control –> Output Determination –> Maintain Output Determination for Outbound Deliveries –> Maintain Output Determination ProcedureV10000 is the Standard Procedure. We can Create the New procedure by clicking on the New Entries or by Copying from the standard one. Select the Procedure and click on the control data field as shown.We can assign the condition type as “SPED” by clicking on the New Entries as shown.                            Enter Step as –> 50, Count as –> 1. After Maintaining the data click on the save button.Remember that for the requirement 408/1, the inbound delivery will be triggered AFTER goods issue posting for outbound delivery.                                                                                                                    Assign Output Determination Procedures:                                                                                              Configuration: SPRO –> IMG –> Logistics Execution –> Shipping –> Basic Shipping Functions –> Output Control –> Output Determination –> Maintain Output Determination for Outbound Deliveries –> Assign Output Determination ProceduresAssign Output Type as “SPED” to the Output Determination Procedure and delivery Type. After Completion of assigning click on the save button.

  • Note: Before Maintaining the Condition record, Maintain the back-end settings required for Inter-Company or Cross-Company STO. (Maintain the settings Assign the Delivery Type (NLCC) to the Document type and Supplying Plant.)
  • If we can’t maintain the setting, we can’t assign the partner in the Condition Record. The system throws an Error that Customer Master Data does not exist.

Maintain the Condition Record:                                                                                                            Enter output Type as “SPED”.

Make sure that the value of the field Partner cannot be empty in this condition record. After Maintaining the required data click on the save button.Assign Receiving Point for Inbound Deliveries:                                                                    Configuration:  SPRO –> IMG –> Logistics Execution –> Shipping –> Basic Shipping Functions –> Shipping Point and Goods Receiving Point Determination –> Assign Goods Receiving Points for Inbound DeliveriesWe can maintain the Shipping Points to the Plant and storage location by clicking on the New Entries or by copying from the standard one.

  • We need to assign shipping point for all receiving plant/storage location combination.

After Assign the data click on the save button. Set Up Confirmation Control:                                                                                                  Configuration: SPRO –> IMG –> Material Management –> Purchasing –> Confirmations –> Set UP Confirmation controlWe can create the Confirmation Control Key by clicking on the New Entries or by Copying from the Standard one. Select the Confirmation Control Key and click on the Confirmation Sequence.

  • If We copy from the Standard one the data will be updated automatically.
  • If We create by clicking on the New Entries, we need to maintain the data Manually.After Maintaining the data click on the save button.                                                                              Make sure that the check box GR-Relevant and GR Assignment Key are both selected.After Maintaining the back-end settings, Next Create the STO purchase order in ME21N.
  • Maintain the confirmation Control.

                                 Standard PO created under the number 4500000902.

  • Create the Outbound Delivery in VL10D/VL10B
  • With Reference to the Outbound Delivery Number Post the Goods Issue in VL02N

We can check whether our Output Type is triggered for Outbound Delivery in VL03N.Now check whether the inbound Delivery number is triggered or not in the Purchase Order. (Go to ME23N). The inbound delivery number is automatically triggered in the Purchase order.

Remaining process is same, The Receiving Plant will do the MIGO. Check the inbound Delivery in VLO3N.

  • We can do this Scenario for both Inter and Intra Company Code STO’s
  • We can do this Scenario for only Two-Step process.
  • If we can try it for one step process, we will get an error like this No goods receipt is possible for Purchase Order.

entry.title: Hello Experts, Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there a way to extend sap fiori app ( Request Material MDG ) in BAS. 

when creating adaptation project in BAS we are not getting the option to extend for this particular app. 

or is there any other way to extend this app. 

P.S : SAP WEB IDE is not available as account is in cloud foundry environment.

entry.title: Re: How to enhance the Request Material(MDG) App Lean App...
entry.content: See the parallel thread about adding custom fields to the request material fiori app.

entry.title: Re: Enable events from S/4HANA cloud to Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi,

thank you for this great step-by-step description. 

In the section "Create instance of S/4HANA cloud extensibility service", step 5 "Click on next and put instance descriptor JSON" I had to add:

{
"emClientId": "S4HC",
"systemName": "S4HANA Cloud"
}

instead of the JSON that you show. The JSON that you show appears in the Service Descriptor in Event Mesh.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Hello Experts, Is there a way to extend sap fiori app...
entry.content: See the parallel thread about adding custom fields to the request material fiori app. You may follow up on the answers provided there.

entry.title: Re: Customer COE – Accelerate Your Journey to the Cloud with SAP Customer Evolution Program
entry.content: Thanks for the heads-up, very valuable!

entry.title: Re: Configuring Time Based Auto-Assembly (TBAA) in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: Hi is there a way in sap to automatically switch from one material (or next issue) to another when the old material is at zero?

entry.title: Re: EWM Putaway Storage Section Indicator Defaulting to I...
entry.content:
Hi,

Error message "No bin search possible. Storage types/sections/bin types incomplete" (/SCWM/PUT_BIN_DET 075) basically means that no storage type / Storage section / bin type combination is found for a destination bin search. 

I would check the setup of your putaway strategies. 

Is there a storage type search sequence maintained that finds storage type for your product. Same for storage section and bin type. 

I would first check the putaway warehouse task creation log. You can do it in the warehouse monitor -> tools -> applciation log. Search for object /SCWM/WME you might further restrict to subobject WHS_TASK. In the application log you see he detailed steps which steps in putaway warehouse task creation have been successful and when did it fail. e.g. you see of a storage type is found, but no section or bin type.

Note: you will find only an application log if logging is switched on in transaction /SCWM/ACTLOG

Best regards,

Matthias

entry.title: Re: CONFIG.READ_CALUCATED_MEMBER_VALUES

entry.title: Bydesign:let me know the data source that can confirm the Actual Delivery Date of Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
(1) Please let me know the data source that can confirm the Actual Delivery Date of Inbound Delivery.
(2) Please let us know the data source that can nucleate the Planned Delivery Date of InboundDelivery Notification.

If none of the above is available, what is the name of the object in CustomOdata that can achieve the above?

entry.title: Re: ODATA API Consumption SAP Datasphere - API filtering...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please try to replace the space on either side of 'eq' with '%20', the new filter as below:

FiscalYear%20eq%202022

Regards,

Simon

entry.title: Read PDF form as binary data in S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, I am faced with the following scenario: A custom Fiori/freestyle application should be developed which would then display as a print preview some standard form out of the SAP S/4HANA output management. Theoretically let's say that this form should be the Purchase Order PDF form. 

In S/4 Hana on-prem/private cloud you would use the NAST output and the spool id to get the document as a binary data so that it can be sent to the frontend using a OData service.

I fail to figure out how I am supposed to read the PDF document that was/will be generated when creating a new Purchase Order.

So the flow should be the following :

End user creates a Purchase Order -> the Purchase Order PDF is generated and stored in the system - > end user opens the custom Fiori/Freestyle application -> he is able to use a button to get the same document on his screen using the PDF Viewer control.

I would love to have some ideas if this is even possible, and if so how 🙂

entry.title: Transfer sales order stock from one location to another in same plant
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have sales order stock in receiving SLoc and want to move it in shipping SLoc within the same plant, can anyone explain, how to transfer sales order stock from one location to another in same plant?

entry.title: Re: Test drive Joule's generative AI features in SAP Build Code now!
entry.content: Hi @Masoom - please follow the steps in the "Support during the test drive period" section above, to get help from the product team experts here. Good luck! 👍

entry.title: Trigger Pop-up on Item Field Change in VA02
entry.content:
I'm looking for a way to display a pop-up message whenever a user modifies a specific item field within VA02 (Change Sales Order). Ideally, this pop-up should appear upon double clicking any item field.

Here are some details about my requirement:

  • Trigger: Pop-up appears when a user clicks on any item field.
  • Content: Created two custom fields in additional tab B, expected rev and margin. Create a pop-up when line item fields change - Did Expected rev or margin change ? - Yes or No - If yes - popup to take new values to those custom fields. Also to setup incompletion of order if these values are blank.

#VA01 #VA02 #USEREXITS #ENHANCEMENTS

entry.title: Gen AI capabilities of IBP
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Kindly share information regarding Gen AI capabilities in SAP IBP. Below is the required information.

 

#IBP #SCMIBP #IntegtatedBusinessPlanning 

 

L3 ProcessL4 Process

Features in IBP

Gen AI Model IntegrationAbility to integrate external Gen AI based models with Planning System Intelligent Supply Chain ForecastingAbility to use Gen AI to run advanced analytics models in addition to inbuilt models New Product Introductions  Dynamic Supply Chain DesignAbility to create, update and prioritize transportation lanes used in supply planning dynamically for every supply run. Planning AssistantChatbot to support on planning SOPs and a guide to support daily activities of planner Production Scheduling and DRPEfficient scheduling of STOs and Work orders across the network to optimize cost and service levels Synthetic Data GenerationGenerate synthetic data to simulate scenarios

entry.title: Re: No Recipient found for message type MBGMCR in the ALE...
entry.content:
Dear, 

Please review note: https://me.sap.com/notes/1919954/E - it mentions that it is not possible to setup an outbound idoc for MBGMCR. The issue that you're facing is because you can't add MBGMCR in the distribution model and the system can't find it in table where the partner profile are stored (sender and receiver).

In short: implement MBGMCR in a BADI 🙂 

Kr,

Ken

entry.title: Re: MEMBERSET for current month in [d/Date] dimension wit...
entry.content: I already thought about this solution, but it doesn´t allow me scheduled execution of the data action with the calendar.

entry.title: How to check ATP results for multiple items on one screen (Public Edition)
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts?


Is there a way to check ATP results for multiple items at once in Public Edition?
Currently, when i search for one item, i can check ATP calculation results (available inventory quantity) for multiple dates. (In CO09)
But on the other hand, is there a Standard Report that allows me to check the ATP calculation results for multiple items by specifying a specific date?

Answers I'll wait.

thank you 🙂

SAP S/4HANA for advanced ATP 

ERP ATP

Rakesh

entry.title: ABAP Platform Trial 1909 ( error in license check)
entry.content:
I am new in SAP environment and I got SAP Universal ID

I referred post ABAP Platform Trial 1909 Available Now

I just pull the docker image and launch command

docker run --stop-timeout 3600
-i --name a4h -h vhcala4hci -p 3200:3200 -p 3300:3300 -p 8443:8443 -p 30213:30213 -p 50000:50000 -p 50001:50001 sapse/abap-platform-trial:1909_SP01
-skip-limits-check -agree-to-sap-license

-container is running

I used SAP GUI to access to the the system  set credentials : user: DEVELOPER and password:ABAPtr1909 

I got this message : Logon not possible ( error in licence check)

I lost some  steps?

Some help? Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How to read TR versions?
entry.content: Please do not post a solution. Instead, click on "show replies" then "comment".

entry.title: Through MRP run, Flexible Workflow for Purchase Requisition is not triggerring
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I have configured flexible workflow for Purchase Requisition at Document type level.

While running MRP Run (Fiori App-Schedule MRP run), workflow for Purchase Requisition is not triggering. Please suggest me the steps if i am missing out. 

Thanks,

Debashis Rout

entry.title: Re: How to read TR versions?
entry.content:
Your questions:

  1. Why SAP is not sorting based on DATE which is makes more sense
  2. What is the bottom row - S(System generated) on 10/23, all 3 rows are having same author?
  3. Why SAP is not showing the TR number on the ACTIVE version row?

entry.title: Hello Experts I am on BYD and I have a Production order I need to cancel
entry.content:
I have a Production BOM that is for output quantity 1 but the user meant to put 1X in the production model they produce the 1x this leads to the production task for supply to multiply the quantities and end up with the wrong confirmations.

the make task has already been finished and confirmed hence I am unable to cancel the production order.

I am also unable to confirm different quantities on the task.

Your thoughts on how you would go about this is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to check which release strategy characteristic values are being used in a purchasing documen
entry.content: Thank you eduardarocha, you saved my day!

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements - Save Variant/Layout not working...
entry.content:
It should look something like this, where Property is the column

<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem">
<Collection>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
    <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="Property" />
    <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Property name" />
        <Annotation Term="com.sap.vocabularies.HTML5.v1.CssDefaults">
            <Record>
                <PropertyValue Property="width" String="8rem" />
            </Record>
        </Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="UI.DataField">
    <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="Property2" />
    <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Property2 name" />
</Record>
...
...
...
</Collection>
</Annotation>

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: Again the question: What do mean by "As it does if I select ALL...".?If you don't be precise poeple cannot reply.

entry.title: Re: Data services job taking 6-9 Hrs
entry.content:
Hi @siba_pkd21 ,

there are many reasons which could cause that and it is quite hard to give an answer without further background information.

Here are some helpful hints:

1. Read & get familiar with the following blog to try and optimize this job. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/let-the-database-do-the-hard-work-better-performance-in-sap-data-services/ba-p/13083941

2. If extracting high data volumes from a SAP ERP/ECC, use ABAP Dataflows preferably

3. Try to push down as many operations as possible to the Database

4. Make sure your DS Version is compatible with the DBMS. Upgrade DS as well as the DBMS to the most up to date versions compatible as per PAM

5. Try to parallelize the Dataflows wherever possible

6. Check the ressource consumptions of the Data Services Jobserver when such jobs are running and size accordingly

 

BR,

Julian

entry.title: Re: How to read TR versions?
entry.content: The first one is the active version. It is sorted by date.

entry.title: Re: 417 An authorization problem occurred when downloading the configuration
entry.content: Thanks for the solution, it worked for me too.

entry.title: Re: Algorithm to find the best combination of values
entry.content: Seems to be a sort of Knappsack problem. I didn't analyze your code. But a brute fore attack may result in very long runtimes. Did you test this with a large number of batches, e.g. 20? How is your runtime then?

entry.title: SAP Build process Automation - Document Extraction Service: Missing Rights?
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am currently trying to Automate a process using the Build Process Automation Service. I was planning to use the Document Information Extraction Service in this Automation, but for some reason it doesn't show up if I am looking for it. 

Normally I should be able to select "Document Template" but if I use the Build Process Automation Service, its just not there.

 

Same thing here: I should be able to use an "Extract Data" Activity, but it's not there: 

I assume its because of missing rights, but I don't know which rights could be missing. I am able to use the Document Extraction Service in the BTP, but not inside SAP Build

 

Does anyone know what might be the reason for all of this? Thank you!

Julian

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: If you enable STREAMING option it opens a combo box with 2 values: ALL & SPECIFIED ONES. If you select ALL the all elements return in JSON as an array [ ]. This is the "select ALL".

entry.title: Re: After implementing SAP Note 3395784, Error 8 on TOC C...
entry.content:
This sounds a bit like the change implemented by note 3395784 is not reflected in all calling (or called) function models. First step would be to double-check if all the prerequisite notes (like 2651098 up to NW 753) have been implemented in their latest version.

If this is the case you should open a ticket at SAP because then it is possible that some prerequisite is missing in note 3395784...

entry.title: Re: Read PDF form as binary data in S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: The PDF document is stored in an archive via archive link. You find the connection in the tables TOA01/02/03. The archive gives you an URL to display the document. Alternatively you can read the binary of the document by SMCS* function modules or you can read the binary of the pdf during generation and store it temporarily in the DB.

entry.title: Re: How to show value help with values for Application Jo...
entry.content: Any update on this? This is a pretty significant and fundamental usability gap.

entry.title: 打印期间出错，确保定义所有参数
entry.content:
SAP Business One Client在windows10 ltsc版本中打印或是打印预览出错，显示：打印期间出错，确保定义所有参数。
       故障图片见附件。
       已更新所有windows10 ltsc补丁，同时换电脑重新安装windows10 ltsc和SAP系统故障依旧。
       但在其它windows7或windows10版本中没有此问题，所以有没有什么解决方法，请指教，谢谢！

entry.title: User Description update
entry.content:
Dear all,

I try to change user description using BAPI BAPI_USER_CHANGE  or IDENTITY_MODIFY. I hope that will change IDADTYPE too (the same than using Fiori).

In both case function modules return a message 201(SUID01) : User attribute "Description" cannot be maintained in this system.

We have a CUA.

This description can be changed using Fiori Application but not in workbench system.

After trying to see this property in transaction SCUM, I am not able to see corresponding property.

Any idea?

Thanks for your help.

Regards,

David

entry.title: Re: ABAP-Types with class
entry.content:
Non-DDIC don't have a domain 🙂
You might be looking for something else.

entry.title: Re: Read PDF form as binary data in S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: The PDF document is stored in an archive via archive link. You find the connection in the tables TOA01. The archive gives you an URL to display the document. Alternatively you can read the binary of the document by SMCS* function modules or you can read the binary of the pdf during generation and store it temporarily in the DB.

entry.title: customer account for collect
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an urgent issue where a customer account number for collect is being copied when I enter sold-to-party in sales order with pop-up. But i am dont know from where this number is coming from. i have checked with vcust and in customer master but i couldn't find it. This number is used against billing with customer.

this number is copied to text field in header but customer is deleting the field and saving sales order so company can provide free firght, but still this field is copied to delivery. when i tried to make changes in text determination, the pop-up itself not comming. Please help me on this.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 10
entry.content:
Here are the resources mentioned in this episode:

  • This week's SAP Developer News https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3gAvEGa5Mt0
  • Latest task in April's Developer Challenge https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/april-citizen-developer-challenge-sap-build-apps-task-2-formulas/m-p/13665194
  • SAP CodeJam events https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/eb-p/codejam-events
  • Avoid design time CAP server restarts when maintaining local data files https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/04/10/avoid-design-time-cap-server-restarts-when-maintaining-local-data-files/
  • Improve your CAP dev container shell prompt https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/04/11/improve-your-cap-dev-container-shell-prompt/ 
  • Test drive Joule's generative AI features in SAP Build Code now! - TWO live streams scheduled https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/test-drive-joule-s-generative-ai-features-in-sap-build-code-now/bc-p/13667821#M48213 
  • CAPB2B working repository https://github.com/qmacro/capb2b
  • Quis custodiet ipsos custodes https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quis_custodiet_ipsos_custodes%3F 
  • Perl and DWIM https://blogs.perl.org/users/buddy_burden/2014/02/perl-and-me-part-10-what-we-talk-about-when-we-talk-about-dwim.html
  • Strong opinions loosely held https://www.google.com/search?q=strong+opinions+loosely+held
  • Service integration with CAP - CodeJam https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-service-integration-codejam/

And the initial resource in Capire for Compositions:

  • (Capire) Domain modelling - Compositions https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/domain-modeling#compositions

entry.title: Re: Is there a mandatory parameter document for the inter...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you mean parameters for the connection to the SBO database, you can take a look at the example code that comes with the SDK when you install it. The documentation is notoriously bad. It is best to to create a method to make the connection. Determine all parameters from the documentation or translate this vb.net code to java:

 vCmp = New Company
With vCmp
.Server = "***"      'Name of the database Server 
.DbUserName = "***"  'Database user
.DbPassword = "***"  'Database user password
.LicenseServer = "***"  'Name of the server where the license server is installed
.CompanyDB = "***"      'The name of the company database
.UserName = usr         'The B1 user name
.Password = pwd         'The B1 user password
.language = BoSuppLangs.ln_English        'The logon language
.DbServerType = BoDataServerTypes.dst_MSSQL2019
.Connect 'Returns and integer. 0 = connection opened successfully
End With

If you mean mandatory parameters for transactions (sales orders, invoices, purchase orders, etc.), there are very few absolutely mandatory parameters. However, there can be more if the system was not setup correctly. What I mean is, if certain default settings were not determined, you will need to provide them when you try to create a transaction.

Absolutely mandatory parameters for the transaction header:

  • CardCode

Absolutely mandatory parameters for the transaction lines:

  • ItemCode
  • Quantity

Absolutely mandatory parameters for creating master data (items, business partners):

  • CardCode / ItemCode

entry.title: Re: Creating Compound Keys in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi, thanks a lot for your work!

We have implemented it as in your description and added an association "text view" for cost center texts to the dimension view of cost center. 

When we open the report (or the analytic model preview) the cost center texts are displayed. But they are not displayed, when we use the cost center as a variable in the prompt. Unfortunately SAP couldn't help us with this issue.

Do you have any idea how to get texts displayed in the prompt when the charactistic is compounded (like cost center and controlling area).

 

Thank you in advance!

 

Kind regards

Stefan

entry.title: Re: Bydesign:let me know the data source that can confirm...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

Planned Delivery Date is fulfilled when creating Inbound Delivery Notification.

Actual Delivery Date is fulfilled when creating Inbound Delivery.

I have confirmed that the planned delivery date cannot be found by query Inbound Delivery ID neither from Backend nor from any report.

As a workaround, you need create two custom OData based on below BOs.

  • For Planned Delivery Date, BO: InboundDelivery( refers Inbound Delivery Notification), Path: root-> Date or Arrival Period.
  • For Actual Delivery Date, BO: ConfirmedInboundDelivery (refers Inbound Delivery), same path as above.

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone Content Explorer Can't Show App
entry.content:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/appstudio-fioriapps-mta-build-deploy.html

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-launchpad-integrate-sapui5-app.html

Please refer to the above document， Deploy my application to SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment.

But Content Explorer doesn't show the app.

Why does this happen?

entry.title: Re: SAP Exception while calling RFC from .NET MVC Framework.
entry.content: Sandra is right: this is definitely a bug in NCo (SAP .NET Connector), that needs to be fixed by the dev team. So you should a) make sure you are using the latest NCo patch level (which is currently 3.1.4) and b) raise an OSS ticket, if the crash still occurs with that version.

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 10
entry.content: Hi DJ, These links are not accessible during the livestream. We can't see this links till you actually finish your comment with the comment action button on the event page at the end of live stream.

It would be nice to also have VB.NET in the Language dropdown on the Insert / Edit code sample form.

This programming language is used a lot with SAP Business One.

entry.title: Notification event for total number of messages in SAP Cloud ALM integration & exception monitoring
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to monitor total number of messages processed in integration suite, but a metric or event like this doesn't exist.
For example say when we've processed a 2000 messages in a day we would like an alert and email.

KBA "3398745 - Can custom Events be defined for missing metrics in the various SAP Cloud ALM Use Cases? " indicates it might be possible.
Please can you help?

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SuccessFactors: External content is being cut off
entry.content: I have created a bunch of e-learning courses for a client using an external tool. The slides have a 16:9 standard format (960x540). The customer is now reporting that SuccessFactors is cutting off the content on the slides. I have not been able to reproduce this error in tests in other LMS environments. There, the courses are fully responsive. The customer claims that nothing can be changed in the SuccessFactors settings and that I should resize the slides to an other format. Is this true? And if so, which slide format is optimal for SuccessFactors?

entry.title: Re: Notification event for total number of messages in SA...
entry.content:
Custom events in SAP Cloud ALM Integration & Exception Monitoring must use one of the built-in event types, such as "Erroneous messages". The "custom event" aspect mentioned in KBA 3398745 refers to the ability to configure different parameters, filters, etc. 
Other apps (e.g. Health Monitoring) only allow (and offer) pre-built events without any deep configuration (parameters, etc.). 
So Integration & Exception Monitoring events can be customized from their parameters perspective, but still must rely on the built-in event types. 

In general, if an event type does not reflect the kind of event you wish to be notified about then it is a good idea to check the other Operations apps in SAP Cloud ALM. It is possible that other use cases may have a metric or event more in line with what you desire. 
In this scenario, none of the other apps offer a metric or event related to "total Integration Suite messages processed".

There are three options to proceed: 

  1. The data can still be observed in the Integration & Exception Monitoring app, and a manual e-mail can be sent by SAP Cloud ALM (using the e-mail "envelope" icon on the bottom left of the Integration & Exception Monitoring screen navigation rail).
  2. Access the SAP Customer Influence program - SAP Cloud ALM for Operations and either vote on an existing request, or create a new one to capture your business need so that the Developers can consider adding the metric/event. 
  3. Build an external dashboard/program using the SAP Cloud ALM Analytics outbound API, and create a custom program to send an e-mail based on the data the dashboard/program pulls. (Very technical, requiring development experience and a mail server).

entry.title: Re: Bydesign:let me know the data source that can confirm...
entry.content: One point just miss: how you get IDN ID based on CID. BO: ConfirmedInboundDelivery, path: Root-> BusinessTransactionDocumentInboundDelivery

entry.title: Re: Launchpad Home Page - Open App New Browser Tab - Lean State
entry.content: Did you find a solution to this?

entry.title: Creating Sales Order Drafts via SAP Business One Service Layer API Has NULL OwnerCode
entry.content:
I'm attempting to generate a Sales Order draft using the Service Layer API call. The request is a POST made to a service layer URL: https://oursapserver:50000/b1s/v1/Drafts

The JSON data included in the request is as follows:

 

{
  "CardCode": "ABC0001",
  "NumAtCard": "ABC00001-1001",
  "DocDueDate": "2024-05-01",
  "DocDate": "2024-04-12",
  "TaxDate": "2024-04-12",
  "SalesPersonCode": "16",
  "OwnerCode": "137",
  "DocObjectCode": "17",
  "DocType": "dDocument_Items",
  "TrnspCode": 4,
  "DocumentLines": [
    {
      "LineNum": 0,
      "ItemCode": "ITM01",
      "Quantity": 4,
      "Price": 178.44,
      "Currency": "PHP",
      "VatGroup": "OVAT-V",
      "SalesPersonCode": "16",
      "OwnerCode": "137",
      "DocDate": "2024-04-12",
    },
    {
      "LineNum": 1,
      "ItemCode": "ITM02",
      "Quantity": 20,
      "Price": 250.44,
      "Currency": "PHP",
      "VatGroup": "OVAT-V",
      "SalesPersonCode": "16",
      "OwnerCode": "137",
      "DocDate": "2024-04-12",
    },
    {
      "LineNum": 2,
      "ItemCode": "ITM03",
      "Quantity": 15,
      "Price": 38.00,
      "Currency": "PHP",
      "VatGroup": "OVAT-V",
      "SalesPersonCode": "16",
      "OwnerCode": "137",
      "DocDate": "2024-04-12",
    }
  ]
}

 

 

Technology Q&A

The SalesPersonCode and OwnerCode fields correspond to an SlpCode in OSLP and empID in OHEM. It's worth noting that the SalesPersonCode specified in the JSON differs from the SlpCode associated with the CardCode in OCRD.

Upon executing the Service Layer API call, a Sales Order draft is successfully created. However, while the SlpCode is populated with the SalesPersonCode value of 16, the OwnerCode remains NULL.

What adjustments do I need to make to populate the OwnerCode?

entry.title: Re: Is there a mandatory parameter document for the inter...
entry.content: When creating objects with the Di API, it is probably good to know the following:

entry.title: Re: Read PDF form as binary data in S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Hello, I've stumbled upon this blog post by a SAP employee explaining the differences between the old NAST storage system which indeed is stored in the archive. However here the aim is not NAST but the S/4 Output Control which is related to the public cloud. According to this post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/storing-output-documents-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13552587 the archive link won't be supported.
